title: Montreal Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Montreal with a Z-Score of -3.94. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Montreal are extremely cold, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The city is experiencing a high level of humidity, at 71%, and moderate winds of 8.6 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 14.8 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no need for cooling.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety and minimize disruptions.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to frost
